markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Prophecy's AI content strategy and accelerate Alteryx campaign execution.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Content Strategy:** The "compounding content" strategy reverse-engineers AI citations by creating structured pages for high-intent queries, building on the success of the "Data Transformation Journey Guide" (20% citation rate).](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Alteryx Campaign:** The campaign targets enterprise buyers (Analytics/Platform Leaders) with content focused on efficiency and speed, not just cost, to capture budget from Alteryx contract renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
  - [**Execution Urgency:** Cody needs the first three Alteryx-focused articles by EOW to publish next week. This is critical for managing internal expectations, especially from Raj, and demonstrating immediate progress.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [**Process Fix:** Cody will now use the "Ready to Publish" status for minor edits. GrowthX will add a "Needs Revision" status to streamline the review workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

## Topics

### AI Content Strategy & Rationale

  - [**Core Principle:** Reverse-engineer AI citations by creating structured, purpose-built pages for high-intent queries, rather than relying on traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Proof Point:** A GrowthX client saw a \~20% citation rate increase in 18 hours, validating the strategy's speed and effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Prophecy Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [**Success:** "Data Transformation Journey Guide" has a \~20% citation rate.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - **Opportunity:** For "Alteryx alternatives" queries, Prophecy is mentioned at \#18 but not cited, indicating a content structure/specificity issue.
  - [**Query Selection Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
    1.  [**Relevance:** Maps to an Alteryx use case (e.g., "what is data aggregation?").](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
    2.  [**Demand:** Has SEO volume or Check That signals.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
    3.  [**Winnability:** Identifies gaps in competitor content (e.g., Easy Morph's basic comparison pages).](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
    4.  [**Buyer Journey:** Targets the evaluation stage.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
    5.  [**Trackability:** Can be monitored for mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [**Content Format:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [Listicles are currently effective for AI summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [Strategy will evolve toward deeper, unique content as AI platforms mature, mirroring the evolution of SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### Alteryx Displacement Campaign

  - [**Target Audience:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
      - [**Buyers:** Analytics Leaders & Platform Leaders (often with engineering backgrounds).](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - [**Influencers:** Analysts, who surface pain points but lack enterprise buying autonomy.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [**Positioning:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
      - [**Focus:** Efficiency and speed (e.g., "work faster, fix faster").](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Enterprise rip-and-replace is rare. The goal is to capture budget from Alteryx contract renewals by proving a superior, future-proof solution.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=2142.0)
      - [**Avoid:** Leading with cost.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**Content Briefs:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Informed by sales intel to use buyers' exact language.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Example: "I waited two months and it wasn't done right" → Brief for an Alteryx vs. Prophecy comparison page.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Execution & Process

  - [**Content Quality:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [**Concern:** Raj noted a "weak link" in the process where non-experts produce content.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [**GrowthX Fix:** The internal team was restructured so expert managing editors now create the content directly.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [**Review Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [**Problem:** Cody's comments in the review tool were not triggering status changes.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [**Solution:** Cody will use the "Ready to Publish" status for minor edits (typos, etc.). GrowthX will add a "Needs Revision" status for major changes.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [**Alteryx Content Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
      - [**Request:** Cody needs the first three Alteryx articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Critical for managing Raj's expectations and demonstrating immediate progress.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
      - [**Plan:** Cody will review and publish next week if delivered on time.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
      - [Confirm the three Alteryx articles will be delivered to Cody by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
      - [Add a "Needs Revision" status to the content review tool.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
      - [Use the "Ready to Publish" status for minor content edits.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
      - [Review and publish the three Alteryx articles next week upon delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/xYgq9Fse1dx5QHy6xnnyVQwr6r42TwyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
